Name: MAP_OBJECT_BONFIRE_PARAM
Description: Defines bonfire/map object behavior, menu functionality, multiplayer restrictions, and related event settings.

Fields.Name: Placement Map ID
Fields.Description: The map ID where this bonfire or map object is placed.

Fields.Name: Menu Area ID
Fields.Description: Area ID used for displaying this bonfire in travel or interaction menus.

Fields.Name: Enemy Proximity Disable Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum horizontal distance at which nearby enemies prevent bonfire usage.

Fields.Name: Enemy Proximity Disable Height
Fields.Description: Maximum vertical height difference at which nearby enemies prevent bonfire usage.

Fields.Name: Event Camera Start ID
Fields.Description: Camera event ID used when beginning interaction with the bonfire.

Fields.Name: Event Camera End ID
Fields.Description: Camera event ID used when ending interaction with the bonfire.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Limit Time Reduction
Fields.Description: Amount by which multiplayer session time is reduced or adjusted.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Area ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the multiplayer region or session area associated with this bonfire.

Fields.Name: Can Burn Bonfire Ascetic
Fields.Description: Determines whether the player can use a Bonfire Ascetic at this bonfire.

Fields.Name: Can Burn Human Effigy
Fields.Description: Determines whether the player can use a Human Effigy at this bonfire to disable online multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Can Burn Estus Flask Upgrade Item
Fields.Description: Determines whether Estus Flask reinforcement items can be used at this bonfire.

Fields.Name: Menu Sort ID
Fields.Description: Controls the ordering of this bonfire within menus.

Fields.Name: Bonfire Ascetic Availability Flag
Fields.Description: Flag controlling whether Bonfire Ascetics can be used at this bonfire.

Fields.Name: Boss Kill Count Variable ID
Fields.Description: Variable ID used to track the number of boss defeats associated with this area or bonfire.

Fields.Name: Boss Kill Count Variable ID 2
Fields.Description: Secondary variable ID used to track boss defeat counts.
